allow: PowerShell($out = flutter test 2>&1 | Out-String; $idx = $out.IndexOf\("Failing tests:"\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { $out.Substring\($idx\) } else { "NO FAILING BLOCK"; \($out -split "`n" | Select-Object -Last 3\) })

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $adb\)\) { $adb = "adb" }; & $adb -s 23049PCD8I shell settings get global animator_duration_scale; & $adb -s 23049PCD8I shell settings get global transition_animation_scale; & $adb -s 23049PCD8I shell settings get global window_animation_scale)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $adb\)\) { $adb = "adb" }; & $adb devices; $serial = \(& $adb devices | Select-String "device$" | Select-Object -First 1\).ToString\(\).Split\(\)[0]; Write-Output "serial=$serial"; if \($serial\) { Write-Output "animator=$\(& $adb -s $serial shell settings get global animator_duration_scale\)"; Write-Output "transition=$\(& $adb -s $serial shell settings get global transition_animation_scale\)"; Write-Output "window=$\(& $adb -s $serial shell settings get global window_animation_scale\)" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); k=d.get\('GEMINI_API_KEY',''\); print\('GEMINI_API_KEY length:', len\(k\)\)")

PowerShell(cd "A:\\IGrow"; $out = flutter analyze lib/features/reports lib/features/sms_capture lib/features/transactions lib/features/shell 2>&1; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "warning -|error -"\); Write-Output "--- files mentioned \(my changed files?\) ---"; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "reports_screen|capture_view_model|capture_confirmation|sms_capture_service|main_shell"\) | Select-Object -First 12)

PowerShell(cd A:\\PocketPlus; $e = \(flutter analyze lib 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error -"\).Count; Write-Output "errors: $e"; $w = \(flutter analyze lib 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "warning -"\).Count; Write-Output "warnings: $w")
PowerShell(cd A:\\PocketPlus; $a = flutter analyze 2>&1; "errors: " + \($a | Select-String "error -"\).Count; $a | Select-String "error -" | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell($f = \(Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($f\) { "flutter: $\($f.Source\)" } else { "flutter not on PATH" })

PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "gh: $\($g.Source\)"; gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 8 } else { "gh not installed" }; "=== git ==="; \(Get-Command git\).Source)

description: Impeccable design detector: runs after Edit/Write/MultiEdit on UI files and surfaces findings as system reminders.
